evals.prompt: Build a landing page for Thrive Retreats' Stress Less Retreat
evals.expected_output: Downstream mode — reads wiki, brand-config.json, creative brief. Generates retreat booking page (10-14 sections) with Thrive branding. HTML prototype + page-spec JSON.

assertions.name: downstream_context
assertions.description: Loaded brand-config.json, offerings.md, and any available creative brief from wiki

assertions.name: page_type
assertions.description: Identified as retreat_booking page type (high-ticket $300-2000)

assertions.name: section_count
assertions.description: 10-14 sections following retreat booking architecture from landing-page-research.md

assertions.name: above_fold
assertions.description: Hero has headline, CTA, and trust signal visible above fold on mobile 375px

assertions.name: brand_applied
assertions.description: Uses Thrive brand colors (#e71c24 accent, #2a3832 forest), fonts, logo

assertions.name: copy_quality
assertions.description: Headlines follow formula from copy-frameworks.md, CTAs are first-person action+benefit

assertions.name: responsive
assertions.description: Mobile responsive with media queries, sticky CTA, thumb-zone CTAs

assertions.name: validator_pass
assertions.description: Passes validate_output.py with 0 critical issues

evals.prompt: Create a landing page for a weekend yoga workshop in Ashfield, Sydney. $120 per person, beginner friendly, 3 hours.
evals.expected_output: Standalone mode — asks guided questions, generates workshop/event page (6-10 sections). Shorter, logistics-focused.

assertions.name: standalone_mode
assertions.description: Recognized no wiki, asked for details or used provided info

assertions.name: page_type
assertions.description: Identified as workshop_event page type (mid-ticket $50-300)

assertions.name: section_count
assertions.description: 6-10 sections following workshop architecture

assertions.name: logistics_strip
assertions.description: Key details strip near top: date, time, location, duration, price

assertions.name: short_copy
assertions.description: 600-1500 words total, concise for simple event

assertions.name: registration_form
assertions.description: Short form with 3-5 fields max, no unnecessary fields

evals.prompt: Build a lead gen page for a free wellness consultation
evals.expected_output: Lead gen page (4-7 sections). Minimal form, strong social proof, how-it-works section.

assertions.name: page_type
assertions.description: Identified as lead_gen page type

assertions.name: section_count
assertions.description: 4-7 sections, under 1000 words

assertions.name: form_fields
assertions.description: 3 or fewer required fields (name, email, optional phone)

assertions.name: how_it_works
assertions.description: 3-step process section included

assertions.name: risk_reducer
assertions.description: Microcopy near CTA: 'No spam', 'Takes 30 seconds', or similar

evals.prompt: The landing page audit found these issues with Retreat House's current page: CTA below fold on mobile, no social proof above fold, form has 9 fields, no FAQ section. Build a new page that fixes all of them.
evals.expected_output: Downstream mode — reads audit results and fixes every CRITICAL/HIGH issue. Validates fixes against audit checklist.

assertions.name: audit_aware
assertions.description: Referenced audit findings and addressed each one specifically

assertions.name: cta_above_fold
assertions.description: CTA visible above fold on mobile (hero constrained, CTA prominent)

assertions.name: proof_above_fold
assertions.description: Social proof element in or near hero section

assertions.name: form_reduced
assertions.description: Form reduced to 3-5 fields from 9

assertions.name: faq_added
assertions.description: FAQ section added with 6-10 objection-handling questions

evals.prompt: Build a 200-hour yoga teacher training landing page for a new studio. $3,500 AUD, Yoga Alliance certified, next cohort January 2027, max 15 students.
evals.expected_output: Teacher training page (8-12 sections). Heavy on curriculum, accreditation, career outcomes. Multi-step application form.

assertions.name: page_type
assertions.description: Identified as teacher_training page type (high-commitment $2000+)

assertions.name: section_count
assertions.description: 8-12 sections following teacher training architecture

assertions.name: accreditation
assertions.description: Yoga Alliance certification prominently featured

assertions.name: curriculum_detail
assertions.description: Program structure with modules/phases, not just a bullet list

assertions.name: pricing_anchored
assertions.description: Pricing uses anchoring and/or payment plan framing

assertions.name: authentic_scarcity
assertions.description: Limited to 15 students and January 2027 cohort as real scarcity
